description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, sbom, release, and scan and a docker:dind service that optionally injects a certificate from $CERTIFICATE_URL. In the build stage add a build job using openjdk:17-jdk that runs ./gradlew build and stores build/distributions/*.tar and build/reports as artifacts, and a build docker image job using docker:latest that echoes the computed variables, logs in to $REGISTRY_HOST with $REGISTRY_USER/$REGISTRY_PASSWORD, builds the image with tag "$REGISTRY_IMAGE:$COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG-$COMMIT_HASH_SHORT" and pushes it. In the sbom stage add two jobs: collect SBOM (syft, docker) using docker:latest that logs in, pulls the image, installs curl via apk, installs syft, and generates docker.sbom.syft.json and table files; and collect SBOM (syft, jar) using ubuntu:20.04 that installs curl, installs syft, and generates jar.sbom.syft.json and table files from the built tar distribution, both publishing any *sbom* files as artifacts. In the release stage add a push docker image job using docker:latest that logs in, pulls the image, tags it as "$REGISTRY_IMAGE:$COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG" and pushes, plus a push docker image on master as latest job (only on master) that tags the same image as $REGISTRY_IMAGE and pushes it. In the scan stage add two jobs using ubuntu:20.04 that install curl, install grype, and scan the docker and jar SBOMs respectively, outputting JSON and table vulnerability reports as *vulnerabilities* artifacts.
